subcodes.first_line: O Lord! The malicious priests, through tyranny and cruelty, have martyred Master Khudabakhsh, who was a manifestation of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار دستوران بدمنش مظهر بخشش ماستر خدابخش را بظلم و جفا شهید نمودند و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @justice and wrath of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
